evidence.description: FIND-SPEC-009 resolved: Clock budget standardized to <=2 at line 284 with consistent path table at lines 289-295. No contradiction remains.
FIND-SPEC-010 resolved: EmptyNoteDiscarded.occurredOn deterministically sourced from flushCurrentSession's own Clock.now() call at line 251. No 'OR' ambiguity.
FIND-SPEC-011 resolved: previousFrontmatter added to EditPastNoteStartInput at line 43, with sourcing explanation at line 47.
FIND-SPEC-012 resolved: Same-note guard on SaveFailedState explicitly clarified at lines 153-154 and 168. Focus event does not imply error resolution.

All 12 requirements (REQ-EPNS-001 through REQ-EPNS-012) verified against domain source-of-truth types. Pipeline stages match stages.ts CurrentSessionDecision union (lines 57-60). SwitchError matches errors.ts (lines 50-54). EmptyNoteDiscarded confirmed in PublicDomainEvent union (events.ts line 149). EditorFocusedOnPastNote confirmed in CaptureInternalEvent (internal-events.ts lines 10, 37-41) and NOT in PublicDomainEvent. SaveError -> NoteSaveFailureReason mapping covers all FsError variants. EditPastNoteStartInput fields are sourced and explained.

Two minor findings remain (FIND-SPEC-014, FIND-SPEC-016) that do not block implementation: (1) NoteSaveFailed emission boundary ambiguity between flushCurrentSession and CaptureAutoSave adapter, (2) undefined behavior when currentNote is null for SaveFailedState. Both are edge cases at the boundary of the declared scope.
FIND-SPEC-013 resolved: PROP-EPNS-013 at line 108 now enumerates all 5 paths with correct call counts: same-note=1, no-current=1, empty=2, dirty-success=1, dirty-fail=0.

19 proof obligations (PROP-EPNS-001 through PROP-EPNS-019) verified. Coverage matrix at lines 136-150 maps all 12 requirements to at least one PROP. 5 required obligations (PROP-EPNS-001 through PROP-EPNS-005) span Tiers 0-1 and cover the highest-risk invariants. Port contracts at lines 42-88 are consistent with behavioral spec. BlurSave now accepts previousFrontmatter (line 58).

One minor finding (FIND-SPEC-015): no proof obligation explicitly verifies that startNewSession performs zero file I/O. The purity boundary map classifies it as effectful (Clock + emit only) but this is not enforced by any listed PROP. Does not block implementation.
